text:
client -> LAN-router-WAN -> webserver (eg. gutefrage.net)
1500      1500       576    1500?

client MTU:
interface: 1500
route: 1500

router MTU:
LAN-interface: 1500
LAN-route: 1500
WAN-interface (em0): 1500
WAN-route: 576 (set by dhcpcd when run on WAN-interface)

webserver MTU: probably 1500. I don't know this for sure.


Does this help?
